name: list_string_noninteger_number_now_claimed
description: Phase 7C CLAIMED (number-display parity closed): list<string> ['a', 5e0]. BAML stringifies 5e0 via serde f64 Display -> "5.0". native now reproduces serde's f64 Display byte-exact (displayFloat64: ryu shortest round-trip), so the element stringifies and native CLAIMS the whole list with no BAML fallback. want is BAML's canonical serde f64 Display.
